data.body: Fix ready (opus investigation + code reviewer passed score=5): mirror _phase_sync drift-detection-and-reset block into _phase_merge after 'cd "$MAIN_REPO"', so --resume correctly resets stale local main before retrying merge. ESCALATED: test gate blocks commit due to pre-existing test-batched.sh flakiness in merge-to-main tests (3 tests pass standalone but fail under test-batched.sh). Fix content reverted pending resolution of the flakiness.
